text:
Congratulations on finishing your first marathon! That's an incredible achievement that deserves to be celebrated. Completing 26.2 miles is a testament to your dedication, perseverance, and mental toughness. The training you put in, the early mornings, the challenging runs, and pushing through when things got difficult—it all led to this moment.

Crossing that finish line is something you'll remember for the rest of your life. You've joined a special community of people who have accomplished something that most people only dream about. Not only did you finish, but you proved to yourself what you're capable of when you commit to a goal and see it through.

Take time to celebrate this accomplishment and let yourself feel proud. You've earned it. Whether this was on your bucket list or the start of a new passion, you should know that what you've achieved today is remarkable. Here's to you and your amazing accomplishment!
